description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:10 Docker image as the default image and caches the node_modules directory. Add a global before_script that runs npm install for all jobs. Define a test:node:10 job in the test stage that runs npm run build then npm test using the default node:10 image. Define a test:node:8 job also in the test stage that overrides the image to node:8 and runs npm run build followed by npm test, with no additional triggers or artifacts.
